utility_evaluation.REASONING:

2. travel_dates: present and with specific dates ✅

4. accommodation: includes hotel name, type, location, total cost, amenities, meal plan, etc. ✅
5. activities: includes types of activities and total cost ✅
6. additional_services: includes dining as an extra service with cost ✅

All seven items are present and fully detailed.
